name: Chloe
bio:
Undead Castle Guard. Once a soldier, he became a zombie after death to guard the Vampire Castle and protect creatures that cannot coexist with humans.

Role: Backline Single Elimination
Intro: A Physical Damage Dealer hero that deals Physical Damage to a single enemy in the backline and has a chance to deal Critical Damage.

skillSlots.name: Deadly Poison Strike
skillSlots.description: Attacks single backline enemy target, dealing 171% P.DMG with 20% extra Crit Rate.

skillSlots.name: Undead's Blessing
skillSlots.description: Increases ATK by 10% and HP by 5%.
